chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4390 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge Present: Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro & Mrs.Kausar Sultana Hussain, JJ. 1. For orders on CMA No.18709/2022. 2. For orders on office objections No.1 & 11. 3. For orders on CMA No.18710/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 22.7.2022 Mr.Afzal Ali Lanjor, Advocate for petitioner. ************* Petitioner/complainant in FIRs No.50/2022 and 51/2022 under Section 489/420/34, PPC, registered at PS Gadap Town, is seeking directions to the respondents, police officials, to arrest the accused named therein. Direct approach by the petitioner instead of pleading his case before the trial Court for the said purpose, is not sustainable, particularly when, it is informed that the trial Court has already issued NBWs for the arrest of accused. This being the position no case is made out. The petition is dismissed in limini being non-maintainable. The petition stands disposed of in above terms along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
